arts.ttl: England squad announcement LIVE: Thomas Tuchel set to name players for first World Cup qualifiers
arts.sum: The new England manager will hold a press conference after announcing his first Three Lions squad ahead of World Cup qualifiers against Albania and Latvia at Wembley

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Man United eyeing transfer of €40m wonderkid who wants to leave his current club
arts.sum: Manchester United are among a long list of clubs eyeing up the potential €40m transfer of Southampton wonderkid Tyler Dibling this summer, CaughtOffside understands. Dibling has caught the eye for the Saints this season, even if it’s generally been a really poor campaign for the club as they look certain to be relegated. Sources close […] The post Exclusive: Man United eyeing transfer of €40m wonderkid who wants to leave his current club appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Nico Williams transfer news: Man Utd to 'RUIN' Arsenal deal
arts.sum: Prior to Man Utd defeating Real Sociedad 4-1 at Old Trafford, Nico fired the Basque side to victory over Roma, setting up a quarter-final encounter with Rangers. Arsenal might be well placed to sign Nico Williams from Athletic Club, but Manchester United are in position to swoop for their Europa League rival.

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand repeats Bruno Fernandes stance after Man United Europa League victory
arts.sum: Manchester United picked up their biggest victory under Ruben Amorim to date as they won 4-1 on the night against Real Sociedad

arts.ttl: Manchester United did something they've not done before under Ruben Amorim in Real Sociedad rout
arts.sum: Man Utd produced their best performance under Ruben Amorim to keep their season alive and cruise into the Europa League quarter-finals by beating Real Sociedad 4-1.

arts.ttl: What Diogo Dalot said to his Man United teammates as they left the pitch after Real Sociedad win
arts.sum: Diogo Dalot was on the scoresheet as Manchester United beat Real Sociedad 4-1 in the second leg of their Europa League last-16 tie at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: I saw what Manchester United fan favourite did to reignite Old Trafford love affair
arts.sum: Man Utd are into the Europa League quarter-finals after an impressive performance saw them beat Real Sociedad 4-1 at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: 'I will just keep doing it' - Patrick Dorgu makes promise to Manchester United teammates
arts.sum: Patrick Dorgu produced another eye-catching showing in Man United's 4-1 Europa League victory over Real Sociedad at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: What Casemiro changed to regain Manchester United place and what Joshua Zirkzee must improve
arts.sum: Casemiro has regained form of late for Man United and received a standing ovation against Real Sociedad.

arts.ttl: Ruben says Dorgu did 'the right thing'
arts.sum: "I felt, during the week, that we showed we can play these kind of games and I think our exhibition against Arsenal was not beautiful, but it helped a lot and, in that second half, we needed to believe. I felt like Joshua Zirkzee has his best game for United, I do not know if you agree, but in that number-10 role it maybe seems to unleash what he can do with the ball in and out of possession.
